title: Vocational School of Health Services
content:
Vocational School of Health Services

Anesthesia

MENU

The aim of this program is to train technicians to help the anesthesia specialist. Students applying for this program should have an interest in biology and applied science; moreover, they should also have such qualities as responsibility, concentration and diligence.  Practice plays an important role during lectures, and internships are also compulsory.

Students who graduate from the Anesthesia department may apply narcosis under the supervision of an anesthesia specialist in all kinds of operations. Whilst they are not legally allowed to apply narcosis without a specialist, they may work in government, university and private hospitals under the supervision of a specialist.

Period of Education

2 years

Prep School:

Optional

Hospital Practice:

Yes

Hospital Internship:

Yes

Education Language:

Turkish
